description: Content pipeline ledger — the only new persistent state of the content pipeline (NOT regenerable: it records what the engine already drafted, so incremental drafting and the long tail can coexist). Written by `/ztn:content --maintain`. Each entry in `drafts` references a SET of `theme_ids` — length 1 for a single-theme post, length N for a cross-theme post. 'Did this draft change' = ANY constituent theme strengthened since `last_surfaced` (the maintainer diffs current map ripeness vs `last_surfaced_ripeness` across all referenced themes). Separated from the regenerable CONTENT_MAP.md view by hard SoT requirement.

draft_entry_schema.last_surfaced: YYYY-MM-DD — last date the maintainer acted on this draft

last_surfaced_ripeness.__doc__: per-theme map keyed by theme_id (one entry per theme in theme_ids); score = the map's ripeness for that hub at last surface. Diff current map ripeness vs this per theme: ANY theme's score up = strengthened.

draft_entry_schema.last_auto_hash: sha256 of the draft body the maintainer last wrote — owner-edit guard: if the current body hash differs, the owner edited it
